concepts.title: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on instruction data
concepts.hook: Teach model to follow instructions; improves instruction-following.

concepts.title: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (LoRA, QLoRA, LLaMA-Adapter)
concepts.hook: LoRA: low-rank updates; QLoRA: 4-bit + LoRA; fits on single GPU.

concepts.title: Domain-specific fine-tuning
concepts.hook: Adapt to domain (medical, legal, code); improves in-domain performance.

concepts.title: Continued pre-training on domain data
concepts.hook: Add domain tokens to vocab; pre-train on domain corpus.

concepts.title: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF)
concepts.hook: Reward model trained on human preferences; policy optimized against reward.

concepts.title: Reward modeling and preference data
concepts.hook: Collect pairwise comparisons; train reward model; must generalize.

concepts.title: Policy optimization (REINFORCE, PPO)
concepts.hook: PPO staple; on-policy; clipped objective prevents instability.

concepts.title: KL divergence constraint and reference model
concepts.hook: Prevent policy drifting too far from SFT model; reference model in loss.

concepts.title: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO)
concepts.hook: Skip reward model; optimize pairwise loss directly.

concepts.title: SimPO, ORPO, KTO post-DPO landscape
concepts.hook: SimPO: remove reference model; ORPO: merge SFT; KTO: handle unpaired data.

concepts.title: GRPO (Group Relative Policy Optimization)
concepts.hook: Online RL; sample groups, compute advantages within groups.

concepts.title: Iterative improvement (DPO → new data → DPO)
concepts.hook: Self-play improves model; iterative rounds push capabilities.
